programmes.show_description: Classic hits from just 1 year - 1979!
Time to show off your nerdy knowledge as Mike Read quizzes you on the stars and songs of 1979!
Classic hits from just 1 year - 1979!
1979 was another top year in music, with pop, disco & new wave rubbing shoulders with rock, synth & 2-Tone. Simon Bates has the story - month by month.
Classic hits from just 1 year - 1979!
Through the 70s country music threw up regular UK chart smashes - from Anne Murray and Johnny Cash in 1970 to Dr Hook and Kenny Rogers at the end of the decade. And yes, there's Dolly!
Feelgood hits from just 1 decade - the 1970s! Platform boots & flares at the ready?
Two is better than one... good things come in pairs... you get the idea! Here's a 70s icon with some more 70s icons - both duos & some killer collaborations!
Feelgood hits from just 1 decade - the 1970s! Platform boots & flares at the ready?
What was in the Top 10 during the Easter holiday in the 70s? We choose 3 mega-hits from each year, 1970 to 1979, with ABBA, Blondie, 10cc, Slade, Kate Bush, Mud, Squeeze, and more!
Feelgood hits from just 1 decade - the 1970s! Platform boots & flares at the ready?
What 70s songs have streamed over a billion times worldwide? There are lots from Rumours & Queen's Greatest, but the songs at 4, 9, 12 & 18 might surprise you!
Feelgood hits from just 1 decade - the 1970s! Platform boots & flares at the ready?
Bruno Brookes guides you through the stats in disbelief! Three hours of top tunes from superstars like Bowie, Abba, Bob Marley, Queen, The Who and more. But why didn't we buy 'em?!
Non-stop 70s rock & guitar action - all night!
Nearly 20 years of rock classics from the biggest band of the era - Queen! 35 videos from 72's Liar to 89's The Miracle - via a multitude of all-time rock anthems.
Crammed full with extraordinary finds, hidden treasures, and plenty of old relics! From AC/DC & Led Zep, to Bowie & Black Sabbath - how many of these family heirlooms do you own?
Crammed full with extraordinary finds, hidden treasures, and plenty of old relics! From AC/DC & Led Zep, to Bowie & Black Sabbath - how many of these family heirlooms do you own?
Non-stop 70s rock & guitar action - all night!
From the era of Glam Rock, New Wave & Disco - it's all the party hits from just 1 decade - the 1970s! Platform boots & flares at the ready?
Anyone for a bit of Kojak rapping or Hutch singing? TV stars, movie stars & comedians - they all made 70s music (of variable quality), but became better known for something else!
From the era of Glam Rock, New Wave & Disco - it's all the party hits from just 1 decade - the 1970s! Platform boots & flares at the ready?
The voice of your childhood Derek Griffiths with 40 of those tunes you pestered your parents to buy - all top pop moments that still bring a smile & happy memories of school days!
From the era of Glam Rock, New Wave & Disco - it's all the party hits from just 1 decade - the 1970s! Platform boots & flares at the ready?
Another batch of silly songs, dodgy videos & novelty hits from the 70s. Yes every one of these was a huge hit!
From the era of Glam Rock, New Wave & Disco - it's all the party hits from just 1 decade - the 1970s! Platform boots & flares at the ready?
Most went onto bigger things - but how did it all start in the 70s? Here are 30 chart and video debuts from household names - some songs are brilliant, but some you might not know.
From the era of Glam Rock, New Wave & Disco - it's all the party hits from just 1 decade - the 1970s! Platform boots & flares at the ready?
Pat Man selects 30 chart toppers of the 70s that have probably slipped your mind! Expect lesser remembered hits from Mud, Dr Hook, David Cassidy, Lena Martell & Brotherhood of Man.
Feelgood hits from just 1 decade - the 1970s! Platform boots & flares at the ready?
Fifty hit songs from famous acts of the 70s - but not a single one made the top 10! Including Bowie, Mud, Abba, Whitesnake, Prince and Bay City Rollers.
In the mid-70s Diddy David Hamilton was on Radio 1 AND Radio 2 at the same time! And these are a choice selection of his records of the week - his "Hamilton's Hotshots"!
